# 3 States Vote Amid $10M Crypto PAC Influence

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | June 22, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Crypto-backed PACs disclosed spending more than $8 million on media to support candidates in three US states, as some Maryland Democrats have called on one candidate to reject “outside spending from crypto billionaires.”

# MicroStrategy Buys $34.9M Bitcoin Amid Market Volatility

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | June 22, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. bought $39.4 million of Bitcoin, leaning again on its common stock to fund purchases of the cryptocurrency for a third consecutive week despite earlier pledges to pivot to perpetual preferred shares.
